case_rate.label_en: PhilHealth MDR (Member Data Record) — latest copy

case_rate.label_en: CF1 — PhilHealth Claim Form 1 (signed by physician)

case_rate.label_en: CF2 — PhilHealth Claim Form 2 (signed by patient or guardian)

case_rate.label_en: Photocopy of member's valid government-issued ID

case_rate.label_en: Statement of Account (SOA) from the hospital

maternity.label_en: PhilHealth MDR (Member Data Record) — latest copy

maternity.label_en: CF1 — PhilHealth Claim Form 1 (signed by OB-GYN)

maternity.label_fil: CF2 — PhilHealth Claim Form 2 (pirma ng pasyente)
maternity.label_en: CF2 — PhilHealth Claim Form 2 (signed by patient)

maternity.label_fil: Maternity Notification Form (MNF) — dapat naisumite na bago manganak
maternity.label_en: Maternity Notification Form (MNF) — must have been submitted before delivery

maternity.label_fil: Discharge Summary ng ina mula sa OB-GYN
Certificate of Live Birth (NSO/PSA) ng sanggol — o birth certificate ng ospital kung wala pa
maternity.label_en: Certificate of Live Birth (PSA) of baby — or hospital birth certificate if PSA copy not yet available

maternity.label_fil: Photocopy ng valid ID ng miyembro
Marriage Certificate (kung asawa ang nag-aaply ng PhilHealth ng miyembro)
maternity.label_en: Marriage Certificate (if applying under spouse's PhilHealth)

maternity.label_fil: Statement of Account (SOA) mula sa ospital
maternity.label_en: Statement of Account (SOA) from the hospital

dialysis.label_en: CF1 — PhilHealth Claim Form 1 (signed by nephrologist)

dialysis.label_en: CF4 — PhilHealth Dialysis Claim Form (if available at the facility)

dialysis.label_fil: Hemodialysis Log Sheet (listahan ng mga session)
Laboratory Results — Creatinine, BUN, at CBC
dialysis.label_en: Laboratory Results — Creatinine, BUN, and CBC

newborn.label_en: CF2 — PhilHealth Claim Form 2 (signed by parent/guardian)

newborn.label_en: Certificate of Live Birth of baby (from hospital)

CF1 at CF2 na kumpleto ang pirma

z_benefit.label_en: Imaging or procedure reports (CT scan, ECG, cath lab, etc.)

z_benefit.label_en: Itemized Statement of Account and Official Receipt

CF1 o katumbas na facility claim record

outpatient_package.label_en: Valid ID of the member or patient
